author: Timo Bechtel
description: Filter and display the content of your notes in a Bases view. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.description:
# [1.3.0](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0) (2026-01-25)


### Bug Fixes

* do not return multiple table headers when filtering table rows ([41ddcf5](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/41ddcf555eceb11d1a45c5e1537cd65c3d2d699b))
* excluding too many items in lists ([2f898e2](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/2f898e288e1809225f8c5aec05a23a5a3c08451d))
* include all parent items when matching list items ([fb5bf7d](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/fb5bf7d5cf5f5fda38d0bc74b418d1167b334cc4))
* jumping to wrong position when navigating back ([69163c3](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/69163c3d58494078518f93abc1495a8505ed7394))
* only match text pattern when line starts with query ([2a7c673](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/2a7c673c47ab5df6d1b379e430762901fe44103a))
* property separator ([6811237](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/68112373356b3912a21fa9fd87a446a785c7ae63))


### Features

* add status bar with number of matching blocks ([82f6cda](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/82f6cda93faf9fe5d3d0e804cdd0bf596dd639b3))
* add table matcher ([e1f2ec0](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/e1f2ec038f199c1e60e47f30dea36b00b4bb2f48))
* allow excluding tags and code languages ([41583ef](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/41583ef169ad4a924935234a05688df5d3142ca9))
* allow filtering quote types ([dae019f](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/dae019f62e9b0a8c93634142928f13453a94024a))
* simplify text pattern and allow inverting ([cc37ad7](https://github.com/TimoBechtel/obsidian-block-view/commit/cc37ad7cb961cc2317bb53770d132cafcaca46a3))
